# OCE Internal Documentation

## OC Europe - Internal doc

- [The Foundation](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/the-foundation.md)
- [Meet the Open Collective Europe Team](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/the-foundation/meet-the-open-collective-europe-team.md)
- [Director (JF)](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/the-foundation/meet-the-open-collective-europe-team/director-jf.md)
- [Financial Compliance & Platform Specialist (Ivan)](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/the-foundation/meet-the-open-collective-europe-team/financial-compliance-and-platform-specialist-ivan.md)
- [Grant & Operations Lead (Laura)](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/the-foundation/meet-the-open-collective-europe-team/grant-and-operations-lead-laura.md)
- [Tools & Platforms Used at OCE](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/tools-and-platforms-used-at-oce.md): Core tools and platforms used by the Open Collective Europe Foundation
- [AI Usage Policy](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/tools-and-platforms-used-at-oce/ai-usage-policy.md)
- [Key Links & Meeting Rhythms](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/tools-and-platforms-used-at-oce/key-links-and-meeting-rhythms.md): This page centralizes key links and the recurring internal routines that structure collaboration within Open Collective Europe Foundation.
- [Email Filters – Suggested Setup](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/tools-and-platforms-used-at-oce/email-filters-suggested-setup.md)
- [Due Diligence Procedures](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/due-diligence-procedures.md)
- [Due Diligence for Unregistered Groups](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/due-diligence-procedures/due-diligence-for-unregistered-groups.md)
- [Risk and Compliance](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/risk-and-compliance.md)
- [Financial and Legal Operational Procedures](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/risk-and-compliance/financial-and-legal-operational-procedures.md)
- [Handling Non-Registered Organizations](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/risk-and-compliance/handling-non-registered-organizations.md)
- [Creation and Sending of Mandate Agreements](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/risk-and-compliance/handling-non-registered-organizations/creation-and-sending-of-mandate-agreements.md)
- [Brand](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/brand.md)
- [Grantmaking Procedures](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/grantmaking-procedures.md)
- [Receiving Funds from the U.S.](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/grantmaking-procedures/receiving-funds-from-the-u.s..md)
- [Myriad USA](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/grantmaking-procedures/receiving-funds-from-the-u.s./myriad-usa.md)
- [Receiving Funds from Europe](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/grantmaking-procedures/receiving-funds-from-europe.md)
- [Support Ops](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops.md)
- [Support Best Practices](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/support-best-practices.md)
- [Operational Checklist – Mandatory Before Action](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/operational-checklist-mandatory-before-action.md)
- [Application Review](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/application-review.md)
- [No Politics on the Platform](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/application-review/no-politics-on-the-platform.md)
- [The Onboarding Call](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/the-onboarding-call.md)
- [Freezing Collectives](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/freezing-collectives.md)
- [Virtual Cards](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/virtual-cards.md): This page outlines the internal policy of Open Collective Europe regarding the use of virtual cards.
- [Google Workspace & Drive Structure](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/google-workspace-and-drive-structure.md)
- [OCE – Periodic Cleanup](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/support-ops/oce-periodic-cleanup.md)
- [Financial Operations – Introduction](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction.md)
- [Financial Ops Task Overview](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/financial-ops-task-overview.md)
- [Bank Transfers for the Collectives](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/bank-transfers-for-the-collectives.md): This page outlines how we manage incoming bank transfers on behalf of collectives hosted by Open Collective Europe. These may include donations, grants, sponsorships, or payments for services.
- [Payment processing and disbursements](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/payment-processing-and-disbursements.md)
- [GitHub Sponsors Payments](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/github-sponsors-payments.md)
- [Payroll Expense Processing](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/payroll-expense-processing.md): This page outlines how payroll-related expenses are handled internally at Open Collective Europe Foundation.
- [Reconciliation Process](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/reconciliation-process.md)
- [Unclaimed or Unreconciliable Funds](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/reconciliation-process/unclaimed-or-unreconciliable-funds.md)
- [Refunds & Disputes](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/refunds-and-disputes.md)
- [PayPal Disputes](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/refunds-and-disputes/paypal-disputes.md)
- [Stripe Disputes](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/refunds-and-disputes/stripe-disputes.md)
- [Stripe Bank Debit in Case of Refunds](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/refunds-and-disputes/stripe-bank-debit-in-case-of-refunds.md)
- [Bank Accounts Management](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/bank-accounts-management.md)
- [Quarterly Accounting](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/financial-operations-introduction/quarterly-accounting.md)
- [Human Resources – Introduction](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/human-resources-introduction.md)
- [Travel & Reimbursements](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/human-resources-introduction/travel-and-reimbursements.md)
- [HR Reports & Resources](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/human-resources-introduction/hr-reports-and-resources.md)
- [Code of Conduct](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/human-resources-introduction/code-of-conduct.md)
- [Recruitment Procedures for Safeguarding Commitment](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/human-resources-introduction/recruitment-procedures-for-safeguarding-commitment.md)
- [Detailed Guidance for Staff on Responding to Safeguarding Issues](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/human-resources-introduction/detailed-guidance-for-staff-on-responding-to-safeguarding-issues.md)
- [Project management](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/project-management.md): This page outlines the core responsibilities and workflows for Project Management within Open Collective Europe.
- [Project Tier Matrix](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/project-management/project-tier-matrix.md)
- [GSF](https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/project-management/gsf.md)


---

# Agent Instructions
This documentation is published with GitBook. GitBook is the documentation platform designed so that both humans and AI agents can read, navigate, and reason over technical content effectively. Learn more at gitbook.com.

## Querying This Documentation
If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.
Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:
```
GET https://docs.opencollective.com/oc-europe-internal-doc/the-foundation.md?ask=<question>
```
The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.
Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
